raw_response:
Tool Call: retrieve("all strains of Neisseria gonorrhoeae susceptibility to penicillin current studies")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

Based on the detailed review of recent literature and ongoing surveillance reports, option \( \boxed{B} \) stating "All strains are highly susceptible to penicillin" appears incorrect given widespread emergence of resistant strains globally, particularly noted in regions like Asia and Europe where higher usage of certain antibiotics correlates with increased resistance. Other claims remain supported by existing evidence, making \( \boxed{B} \)'s assertion overly simplistic and outdated compared to current understandings of evolving microbial resistance patterns towards traditional treatments. Hence, my agreement aligns closely with earlier assessments emphasizing dynamic changes in antibiotic effectiveness against N. gonorrhoeae.
